segments.scene_description: A static view of a dimly lit gothic cathedral interior with stone walls and floors. Wooden pews line the center and right side, with several figures seated facing the raised altar platform on the left. Soft light filters through tall arched windows in the far wall, creating an atmospheric haze throughout the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a dimly lit gothic cathedral interior that emphasizes a sense of solemn stillness. It begins by capturing the vastness of the stone walls and floors, where wooden pews line the center and right side of the nave. As the eye moves across the space, several figures are seen seated in quiet contemplation, facing a raised altar platform on the left. The scene is then defined by soft light filtering through tall arched windows in the far wall, which casts an atmospheric haze throughout the entire sanctuary.
